---
description: Instructions for maintaining code quality and consistency in SPFx projects.
applyTo: **/*.ts, **/*.tsx
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-instructions in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

API and libraries to use for SPFx projects:
* Use the latest version of PnPjs for SharePoint interactions.
* Use React for building user interfaces.

To build custom layouts for the PnP Modern Search web part, use following links as reference:
* [Create a custom layout](https://microsoft-search.github.io/pnp-modern-search/extensibility/custom_layout/)
* [Create a custom web component](https://microsoft-search.github.io/pnp-modern-search/extensibility/custom_web_component/)
* [pnp-modern-search-page-status-layout](https://github.com/a1mery/pnp-modern-search-page-status-layout)
